rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Systemd Loading a Linux Kernel Module Using modprobe

rules.rule_text:
title: Systemd Loading a Linux Kernel Module Using modprobe
id: 4d786f58-8222-4047-b635-6432da31bd7c
status: experimental
description: "Detects the systemd process loading a Linux Kernel Modules using modprobe.\
  \ Part of the \nRedCanary 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/kernel-modules-and-extensions/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.persistence
- attack.privilege_escalation
- attack.t1547
- attack.t1547.006
logsource:
  product: linux
  category: process_creation
detection:
  selection1:
    ParentImage|endswith: /systemd
    Image|endswith: /modprobe
    CommandLine|contains:
    - -a
    - -af
    - -fa
  selection2:
    CommandLine|re: ^.*modprobe.*\s[a-zA-Z].*$
  condition: all of selection*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
